scripts.wait-emu: $ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools/adb wait-for-device shell 'while [[ -z $(getprop sys.boot_completed) ]]; do sleep 1; done;'
scripts.dev:ios: concurrently -n metro,ios -c blue,magenta "npm start" "npm run wait-metro && npm run ios"
scripts.dev:android: concurrently -n metro,emu,android -c blue,yellow,green "npm start" "npm run emulator" "npm run wait-metro && npm run wait-emu && npm run android"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n metro,emu,ios,android -c blue,yellow,magenta,green "npm start" "npm run emulator" "npm run wait-metro && npm run ios" "npm run wait-metro && npm run wait-emu && npm run android"
